case_title: MARK B EDWARDS VS. O'GORKI,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA DELANEY'S

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, MARK B AS TO DEFENDANT O'GORKI,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA DELANEY'S JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, MARK B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'GORKI,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA DELANEY'S $2,761.11 PRINCIPAL, $5.24 INTEREST, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,901.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
